item.title: Much of DHS set to shut down as Democrats demand new restraints on ICE
item.description: Democrats are pushing for new policies requiring agents to wear body cameras and get judicial warrants for raids.

item.title: White House, RFK Jr. shake up health leadership after controversies
item.description: Robert F. Kennedy Jr.’s health department is undergoing a major leadership overhaul.

item.title: Va. Supreme Court paves way for Democrats to add four seats in Congress
item.description: The Supreme Court of Virginia has said the April 21 redistricting referendum can go forward even as it hears the appeal of a lower court’s ruling agai...

item.title: Tracking who Trump is appointing to fill key administration roles
item.description: Follow President Trump’s progress filling over 800 positions, among about 1,300 that require Senate confirmation, in this tracker from The Washington ...

item.title: U.S. orders second aircraft carrier to Middle East as Trump pressures Iran
item.description: The USS Gerald R. Ford, deployed since June, will cross the Atlantic for a second time despite a Navy warning that the warship needs maintenance.
